goals: Extended generation parameters (`--cfg`, `--lyrics`, `--bpm`) are exposed as
Env var and repo-root resolution follow the same pattern established in PRDs 001–003

userStories.title: ace_step audio generation via CLI
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to run `parallax create audio --model ace_step --prompt "electronic ambient" --output out.wav` so that the ACE Step 1.5 pipeline generates a WAV file at the given output path.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Running the command with a valid `PYCOMFY_MODELS_DIR` and `--prompt` spawns
`--prompt` is forwarded as `--tags <value>` to the subprocess.
`--length` is forwarded as `--duration <value>`.
`--steps`, `--seed`, and `--output` are forwarded verbatim.
`--models-dir <path>` is forwarded to the subprocess.
The CLI exits with the subprocess exit code (0 on success, non-zero on error).
Typecheck / lint passes (`bun tsc --noEmit`).

userStories.title: model component flag resolution
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to specify ACE Step model filenames as CLI flags or env vars so that I can run the command without manually editing scripts or shell profiles.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `--unet <filename>` on `create audio` is forwarded as `--unet <filename>` to the
`--vae <filename>` is forwarded as `--vae <filename>`; fallback: `PYCOMFY_ACE_VAE`.
`--text-encoder-1 <filename>` is forwarded as `--text-encoder-1 <filename>`;
`--text-encoder-2 <filename>` is forwarded as `--text-encoder-2 <filename>`;
When a model component value is resolved (from flag or env var), it is appended
Typecheck / lint passes.

userStories.title: extended generation flags
userStories.description: As a developer, I want `--cfg`, `--lyrics`, and `--bpm` on `create audio` so that I can control generation quality, add lyrics, and set BPM from the CLI.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `--cfg <value>` is exposed as an optional flag (default `2`) and forwarded
`--lyrics <text>` is exposed as an optional flag (default empty string) and
`--bpm <n>` is exposed as an optional flag (default `120`) and forwarded
`parallax create audio --help` lists all three new flags.
Typecheck / lint passes.

userStories.title: models-dir and repo-root resolution
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the CLI to resolve the models directory and repo root automatically so that I don't have to repeat these paths on every command.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `--models-dir <path>` on `create audio` takes precedence over
If `PARALLAX_REPO_ROOT` is not set, the CLI prints
The resolved models path is passed as `--models-dir <path>` to the subprocess.
Typecheck / lint passes.

functionalRequirements.description: The script path must be resolved using `PARALLAX_REPO_ROOT` as the repo root.
The subprocess must be spawned with `uv run python <script>` so the correct
`--models-dir` resolution (FR-4a: explicit flag; FR-4b: env var
`stdin`, `stdout`, and `stderr` of the child process must be inherited so
The CLI process must exit with the child's exit code.
The implementation must reuse or follow the same subprocess helper established
The Python example script (`examples/audio/ace/t2a.py`) must not be modified.
